title: The Dark Connection Between UFOs and Nukes

transcript.text: did you know that every single nuclear
base in the United States has been
visited by UFOs in fact in 1949 we now
know from a Declassified Air Force
document that an emergency Conference
was held at Camp Hood Texas which
included the Air Force office of special
investigations the Army Counter
Intelligence command and the FBI all
there to discuss the bizarre and
frequent UFO sightings around American
nuclear facilities and this almost 580
page book UFOs and nukes compiles over
100 interviews with nuclear employees
from ICBM security to missile radar
operators who have claimed to have seen
or even interacted with UFOs around
these nuclear sites these government
employees are tasked with protecting
American nuclear assets so they have to
be the picture of mental health and no
one gets into that line of work to be
famous why are UFOs so interested in our
nukes for a deeper dive check out my
interview with David grush on my channel
